perturbation.original_text: The Recipient shall not make or permit or cause to be made any notes or memoranda based on or relating to Confidential Information or any part of the s ame for any purpose other than the Due Diligence .
perturbation.changed_text: The Recipient is encouraged to make detailed notes and memoranda related to the Confidential Information for purposes of the Due Diligence and for general knowledge enhancement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text prohibits note-taking related to Confidential Information beyond the scope of Due Diligence. The changed text encourages it. This contradicts the intended restrictions of confidentiality which should be protected and creates uncertainty as to what is permitted. The contradiction is within Section 4(a), which describes the return of materials
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Recipient will, immediately on demand by Room2Rent : (a) Return to Room2Rent all documents, reports, notes, memoranda, computer media and other material, which record, contain or relate in a ny way to Confidential Information (including all copies of the same).
perturbation.justification: The original text prohibited making notes related to confidential information, while the changed text encourages making detailed notes related to confidential information. The contradicted text states that the recipient must return all notes and memoranda relating to the confidential information. If the recipient is encouraged to take detailed notes, but then required to return them, there's a contradiction as to whether note-taking is permissible or even encouraged, creating a clear conflict with Section 4(a), which describes the return of materials.

perturbation.original_text: The Recipient acknowledges that any inventions, improvements, discoveries, programs or other form of intellectual property related to the System that are developed by the Recipient will be disclosed to, and become the exclusive property of, Room2Rent .
perturbation.changed_text: Any inventions, improvements, discoveries, programs, or other intellectual property related to the System developed by the Recipient during the term of this agreement will be jointly owned by Room2Rent and the Recipient, with each party having equal rights to commercialize and license the intellectual property.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that any intellectual property developed by the Recipient related to the System becomes the exclusive property of Room2Rent. The changed text introduces joint ownership. This directly contradicts the exclusivity granted to Room2Rent in the original clause. This creates conflict with the clause 6.2 where it is stated that: Room2Rent reserves all of its rights in law and equity, including in respect of the area s of Confidential Information and T rade Secrets.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Room2Rent reserves all of its rights in law and equity, including in respect of the area s of Confidential Information and T rade Secrets. The Recipient acknowledges that the Confidential Information and Trade Secrets, and any intellectual property rights in the s ame (including copyright, design and patent rights) are the exclusive property of and will remain the exclusive property of Room2Rent .
perturbation.justification: The original text assigned exclusive property rights of any intellectual property related to the System to Room2Rent. The changed text now states that such intellectual property will be jointly owned by Room2Rent and the Recipient. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the Confidential Information and Trade Secrets, and any intellectual property rights are the exclusive property of Room2Rent. The change from exclusive to joint ownership creates a clear and direct conflict within the document regarding intellectual property rights.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement will remain in full force and effect and will continue to bind the Recipient notwithstanding any term of any other agreement, or any cessation or termination of the relati onship between Room2Rent or any of its Related Companies.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement will automatically terminate upon the termination of any franchise agreement (or the failure to enter into a franchise agreement) between Room2Rent and the Recipient.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that the NDA remains in effect regardless of the termination of any relationship between the parties. The changed text states that it terminates automatically upon failure to enter a franchise agreement. This is a direct contradiction regarding the agreement's duration. This contradicts the intended restrictions of confidentiality which should be protected and creates uncertainty as to the duration of the agreement. This contradicts the clause 2, which speaks on confidentiality
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Recipient will hold all Confidential Infor mation in strict confidence and will not disclose any Confidential Information to any person, ex cept in accordance with the explicit provisions of this Agreement or, in any other case, only on receiving the prior written consent of Room2Rent .
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the NDA remains in effect regardless of the termination of any relationship between the parties. The changed text introduces a condition where the agreement terminates automatically upon failure to enter a franchise agreement. This creates a direct conflict with the contradicted text, which emphasizes holding confidential information in strict confidence, as the changed text introduces a scenario where that confidentiality agreement may not be in effect. Therefore, the changed text causes a direct contradiction regarding the agreement's duration and enforceability, aligning with the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction, where the changed text is placed with conflicting implications, causing uncertainty regarding obligations.

perturbation.original_text: The Recipient will be liable for any act of any Representative which, if done by the Recipient, would constitute a breach of its obli gations under this Agreement .
perturbation.changed_text: The Recipient shall not be held liable for the actions of its Representatives, provided the Recipient has taken reasonable steps to ensure the Representatives are aware of their confidentiality obligations.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that the Recipient is liable for breaches by its Representatives. The modified text removes this liability if the Recipient takes 'reasonable steps'. This introduces a contradiction regarding liability. Since the liability doesn't apply for the representatives it opens the door for the breach of contract for the representatives, thus affecting the overall NDA. This has a clear contradiction with the clause 5.1, which speaks on indemnity and breach
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Recipient will indemnify and keep indemnified Room2Rent against any and all reasonable and foreseeable claims, demands, losses, damages and costs (including legal costs on an indemnity basis) that Room2Rent incurs as a result of a breach of the Recipient’s obligations under this Agreement .
perturbation.justification: The original text held the Recipient liable for breaches by its Representatives. The changed text removes this liability if the Recipient takes 'reasonable steps'. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the Recipient will indemnify Room2Rent against any losses resulting from a breach of the Recipient's obligations. The changed text creates a scenario where a breach by a Representative might not be indemnified, creating a contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Recipient will, immediately on demand by Room2Rent : (a) Return to Room2Rent all documents, reports, notes, memoranda, computer media and other material, which record, contain or relate in a ny way to Confidential Information (including all copies of the same). (b) Delete all Confidential Information from electronic storage facilities of any type owned or used by the Recipient or its Representatives.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon completion of the Due Diligence, the Recipient may retain one copy of all Confidential Information for archival purposes, provided that such information is stored securely and not used for any commercial purpose. However, the Recipient is not required to delete Confidential Information from its electronic storage facilities, as long as access is restricted to authorized personnel.
perturbation.explanation: The original text mandates the return and deletion of all Confidential Information upon demand. The changed text allows retention of one copy and relaxes the deletion requirement, contradicting the initial obligation to return all information. This contradicts the initial obligation of the NDA. Creates conflict with the clause 2.1, which states: The Recipient will hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence and will not disclose any Confidential Information to any person, ex cept in accordance with the explicit provisions of this Agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Recipient will hold all Confidential Infor mation in strict confidence and will not disclose any Confidential Information to any person, ex cept in accordance with the explicit provisions of this Agreement or, in any other case, only on receiving the prior written consent of Room2Rent .
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates the return and deletion of all Confidential Information upon demand. The changed text allows retention of one copy and relaxes the deletion requirement, contradicting the initial obligation to return all information. This creates a conflict with the contradicted text, which states: 'The Recipient will hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence and will not disclose any Confidential Information to any person, except in accordance with the explicit provisions of this Agreement'. The changed text allows for retention and restricted access, which is not in accordance with the explicit provisions of the original agreement. The contradiction is strong, direct, and impactful, as it creates uncertainty about the Recipient's obligations regarding Confidential Information.
